# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: your-app-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: example-server
  namespace: your-app-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  port: 8080
  protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: example-auth-policy
  namespace: your-app-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: example-server
  requiredClients:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: your-app-namespace
      name: example-client

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: example-client
  namespace: your-app-namespace

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-app
  namespace: your-app-namespace
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example-container
          image: example/app
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
